reviews.review_text:
Grass and Red Dirt uncovered sites.

Very quiet.

Receptionist Tanya was fantastic service and very obliging
Thank you Mark who goes above and beyond for the guests. We had a wonderful stay in the caravan park on our site. The pool is fantastic too!

We were very disappointed that we were not informed at the time of booking about the race taking place on Saturday evening. The noise completely disrupted our evening and significantly impacted our stay.

After reading many great reviews we could not have been more disappointed. Despite the park being very low occupancy, with lots of vacant caravan bays being shaded by lovely trees, we were given a bay with no shade at all. The blistering afternoon sun on our van was unbearable making it impossible to sit either inside or outside. We understand if the park is full you take your chances which bay you get, but with so many vacant bays over the 2 days surely they could have considered allocating us a shady bay. So this 2 star rating is for the let down on service. Also the ablution block is very tired with lots of black cockroaches and crickets coming out in the evening. We decided to leave early and moved on.

Staff are very helpful.
Most spots are shaded by trees and facilities are good.

Caravan park that really need a big changes, we tried the pool that was the only things really worth of this place full of midge, sandflies and merk. We asked for unpowersite with a tree but the answer it was it's all for the staff. I definitely not recommen this place in the shower during you shower you get bite from mozzie, and frogs everywhere, also they come from the pipe and toilet. Last night I was making a shower and we find also a king brown definitely need a lots of maintenance.

Hehe forgot to comment....

Was only here for 2 days but extended to a whole week.

Facilities are amazing. Facilities spotless and cleaned every day.

A swimming pool most hotels would be proud of.

For a break from being totally off grid, I loved my stay here.  Town is literally 5 mins away.

I will definitely come back.

(Note I used a powered site as the camping area was still fairly damp. I did catch End of the Wet, so my fault, but just take note of season when you come)

We had an extended stay at this caravan Park. The park is under new management and to be fair, there is a bit of work that is needed here. The managers are hard working and you can see that the park is looking greener and tidier and yes there is still lots to do. Mark at the front desk is fabulous- he helped me with suggestions heading to Darwin and when my dog injured himself, he had some great suggestions. Nothing is a problem for him. The pool is beautiful. There is so much potential for this place and i cannot wait to see how these guys turn this caravan park around
Great park, the gardens well looked after pool is beautiful. Had a lovely couple of days. Big fridge.
Would love a pet-friendly option! 💗

We are loving our stay at Broome caravan park, a big park with lovely shady trees, friendly staff, great pool. We have extended our stay a couple of time now.
Just a couple of minutes out of town, very safe and we have been theft free.
Nice

10/10 would recommend.
Managers are lovely, very chatty, great sense of humour & very helpful.

We stayed in cabin 11, can honestly say it's the best cabin we've stayed in by far on our trip, and we've been traveling for 9 months now. Can't comment on the shared amenities as we didn't use them, but the staff and cabin, spot on 😁
Update a year on, just as lovely, quiet, clean and lovely staff. We stayed for 3 nights this time round and managed time for a swim in the pool. Pool is huge! We loved our stay here again and would definitely stay again.
Very roomy sites, out of town so security is not the worry it can be in other places. Pool is huge and amenities are great. Off season nightly rate is fantastic value.

I would highly recommend this site to all travelling as a Nomad like us, powered or even travelling as we seen in the park, a kitted out bus! There is space for all!

We arrived in a bit late into broome and called the caravan site to check availability. Cathy and Rem had answered with the most positive attitude, welcoming us to stay, not like a previous site rudely telling us that they dont accept Nomads/Off-grid travellers on their site!

When we arrived it was like being welcomed with big open arms, they are so genuine and supportive of anything you need on site and off with awesome recommendations of what to do in the local area.

The pool is next level! Its definitely the best pool ive seen on a caravan park! Even better than some hotel pools ive come across! Ive seen Cathy and Rem over my stay work so hard to maintain this park!

The park is located 10 minutes from the town center which doesnt bother us at all, gets you away from all the activities in the town.  The Caravan park is super quiet and the wallabies roam around too which is awesome, they are so adorable to watch!

I would highly recommend this site in broome!

This was our second Park in Broome after the last one closed for the wet season we came for the off season  deal and loved it awesome pool but could do with a bit more  shade didn't use the amenities but they look fine the reception lady was lovely and friendly our site was huge and we have big van plenty of room only a ten minute drive to town which was great we would  definitely  come back if in Broome again 😀

Nice pool and good prices
The Toilets and Showers are clean
Great location, super clean and felt very welcomed by all the team. Highly recommend we will return. Thanks gang
Stayed here for one night after a very long drive the staff were so friendly and welcoming!
Powered site great area out of town.
Sauberer Caravanpark, freundlicher Service, guter und grosser Pool

Very relaxing park with one of the best pools 👍 I enjoyed it so much I stayed another 2 nights. The hosts were great and food vans come from time to time.  A nice distance from town too.
I'll be back.

⭐ Honest Review — Broome Caravan Park ⭐

We recently had quite an extended stay at Broome Caravan Park, and our experience was really a tale of two halves.

During the first few weeks while Tiene was managing, everything ran beautifully. She was attentive, approachable, and genuinely cared about the comfort of guests. Nothing was ever too hard for her, and the park felt well-organised and welcoming, which we thoroughly appreciated.

Unfortunately, once management changed hands to Lorraine and her husband, the atmosphere shifted quite a bit. The kids felt anxious and uncomfortable, often told off for very minor things like riding their scooters and playing ball in the pool. The general consensus among guests was that the new management had everyone on edge and completely changed the overall feel of the park.

We also experienced ongoing issues with the park’s “free WiFi” (which didn’t work at all), poor reception with our own internet setup due to overhead powerlines, and very low water pressure. This meant having to manually fill our water tanks every second day, a process that took hours.

To add to the frustration, the pool was closed daily at 5:30pm which makes little sense in the middle of Broome’s summer heat, especially with 35° days.

Overall, we did enjoy our time in Broome and made the best of it, but the park itself could really benefit from stronger, more guest focused management. I sincerely hope the owners take notice, it’s a beautiful place with so much potential, it just needs the right care and consistency.

We stayed one night in a cabin and check-in was delayed until 3:30 pm because it wasn’t ready earlier. The next day, we stayed a bit by the pool after check-out time (10 am), since it’s low season and the place was almost empty. Still, the lady came and told us to leave immediately, which felt pretty rude and unnecessary. After a late check-in and with no one around, we expected a bit more flexibility and kindness. Very disappointing experience.

We are currently doing a 12-18month lap around Australia in a caravan (11 months in so far). We stayed here twice while in the Broome area. Sami the Park Manager was absolutely lovely on both occasions. She went out of her way to be accommodating for both stays.

The park itself has a great sized pool but the only down side is it closes at 5:20pm every day for cleaning and chemicals - the only pool on our lap so far that we couldn’t swim in until dark.

The campsite we had was massive compared to other parks we have stayed at during our lap (when not off grid). We appreciated the extra space.

The park is located about 10mins drive out of town which didn’t bother us. The amenities are tired but still functional, were always really clean but we didn’t really use them much as we have our van. We stayed during off season so was only partial capacity but it meant it was super quiet.

We would come back again but the only suggestion would be that the pool hours get extended so people get more value from their stay.
Best caravan park pool in Broome 🤩

Pool closes at 5.30pm what a joke and straight up lies about it being the council.bathrooms stunk.
Just another soulless carvan park.

Booked here as it was cheapest in Broome at the time (early oct) but were surprised how nice it was. Good sized sites with concrete slab, the whole park is huge so sometimes its a bit of a walk but pool was amazing, on site 70 we had trees overhanging and lots of bats caused some havoc with mess on our caravan and car but overall a good stay and would be back
The staff are friendly and helpful. The facilities are just like a campsite.
Power + water Oct '25 $40pn 2 people with memb disc. Love the space, site options, shade $4 wm. Was not peak season so plenty of room. Amenities were fine.

Excellent endroit pour faire une pause prolongée et se détendre.

Bungalow spacieux et confortable, bien équipé, bien situé. Piscine super. Personnel charmant.

Dommage que le Wifi ne soit vraiment accessible qu'à l'extérieur du Bungalow.
Stonden voor een gesloten deur. Belde het nummer,wij zijn dicht kom morgen maar weer . En anders ga naar discovery. Die gebeld en super geholpen,waren ook al dicht.

Top notch place to stay in I spent four months there in one of their chalets couldn’t fault it at all. Everyone including the ground staff were welcoming
I’ll be booking again next time I’m up here
Very good service
A neat quiet park
Awesome caravan park. Spotless amenities. Jude in the office was so helpful and just a genuine lovely lady.
Enjoyed our stay.  Quite. Great pool.
I definitely rate this place. Lovely chalet room next to pool, great service.

Woman at the reception was not helpful! I kindly asked to help us (a family) during a hot afternoon, she refused to give me the wifi so I can find a place to rest and breastfeed my baby! As we were taking our bicycles to leave she shouted at us « where are you going » thinking we were going to enter the campground. Ridiculous! They only think about money here, I don’t recommend this place to anyone.
We (2ppl) stayed in a cabin, very cosy. Friendly staff greeted us on arrival. Cabin was clean and location was easy to find. Will be using this accommodation for future stays.
Nice place to stay, friendly staff and the park was clean and tidy.
We enjoyed our stay on a large site, good amenities including camp kitchens, clean, lots of bins, very handy to Cable and Gantheaume beaches, town beach and shops. We'd certainly come back again

Very clean and tidy place to stay. Amenities where always very clean and the office staff are just amazing. Friendly and full of local knowledge.

Steve
Great caravan park. Great amenities, dump point, 2 camp kitchens and great pool.
A good place to stay
The personal was so nice! And the pool….. amazing 🤩 it was also the cheapest camping of Broome. Really worth it!
Amazing pool for the kids. Big washing machines. Nice clean showers and toilets and big sites. Having stayed at both this one and the town beach discovery park I’d pick this one!
Love this park, just outside of town.  Pool is amazing,  sites are great, especially for our big set up. reception staff lovely. Bats were present when we were there.
Secure, nice pool, great staff, out of town but not too far to everything.

Had booked 2 nights for a caravan site @ $120 we then choose to book 2 nights extra with friends directly with the camp and was charged $135 and our friends booked the same for $118 next door .when we questioned their was no explanation just excuses so beware before you book.

Unfriendly staff (assistant manager), pool opening hours are ridiculous (8:30-5:30) but you are literally kicked out early because staff wants to go home and need to close the pool… pool is great though. Overpriced for basic and outdated amenities. We have moved to Cable Beach Caravan park where the staff was super welcoming, offer food and a relaxing place to stay.

Reply to their response - review downgraded to 1 star after their reply as we stayed at other parks that open pools from 7-6pm. Council wouldn’t set different rules for different parks.

The Shire of Broome does not set or approve the operating hours for swimming pools in caravan parks. These hours are a management decision made by the caravan park owner or operator. The council is responsible for issuing building permits for pools and spas, and ensuring they comply with all relevant safety standards, particularly the requirements for pool barriers and fencing to prevent drowning.
Excellent location and few km from centre of town and supermarkets.

Park was very big and kept clean ,as I witnessed groundsmen working every day..unfortunately the bathroom in our cabin was very old ,basin was updated but whole bathroom needs to be redone. Tea towel in kitchen kept wiping black fluff over everything. I would say they get washed with the dark towels, so couldn't dry the dishes properly. The smell was the worst part. Whether I was on my cabin deck or at the laundry, I could not escape the smell of sewerage...and it didn't help that the dump point was right outside of the laundry 🤮🤢...
Great place lovely pool

I really like this caravan park. I have to search hard for any negatives but here goes. I use my starlink for work and some sites have huge trees. Pool could be a few degrees warmer. See, I have to look hard to find problems here. 5 stars 👍 I also love that I wan walk to the speedway and support local racing. See you again on our next lap!!!
Stayed here for a few nights with the caravan great place plenty of space and close to town
Nice clean caravan park with grassy sites for camping. Friendly helpful staff.
Caravans Park grande e affollato.
Huge park. Friendly staff, nice pool
5 mins from town, great looking park at a better price than others. G'day Park.  Nice surprise.
Old amenities but clean. Great water pressure. Beautiful pool. Dog friendly. All sites a cemented.

This is our third time in Broome and our first staying here. the service was excellent on entering, I had booked on line and then had extra requirements when booking in and the staff made every effort to assist me. I thought the pricing was good and the park is well set out with plenty of room. The pool is magnificent and will surely be worth a visit.
Good park, very big, had to bucket grey water to holding tank, dump point broken, ( only one in the whole park), good pool area, staff very friendly

We stayed 2 weeks, Shelly  & Brian are a great team, Shelly helped me, as we were desperate for accommodation, Very friendly & helpful & accommodating. This is a large campground, with everything we needed,  Brian is always out there maintaining the place, always a friendly Hello.
Clean and well appointed room. Lovely staff .

Il nostro soggiorno è stato molto gradevole. Piazzole ampie e ben tenute. Bagni in ordine. Cucina comune pulita e funzionale.
Prezzo normale. Posizione comoda per visitare Broome e dintorni. Accesso stradale facile e ben indicato...
Excellent stay.The lady in the office was very pleasant and helpful.
Great

Near Port Drive but we are used to traffic noise. Ground staff brilliant, helpful and courteous. Ablution blocks always clean and tidy would definitely go back again.
Thank you
Spotless grounds & amenities. Quiet location but central to everything. Lovely & helpful office staff.
We really enjoyed our stay here. We got a spot close to the amenities, which were always very clean! I would definitely recommend this place
Lovely park,lovely staff close to shops

We had a very good stay in this caravan park.
Aminities were always very clean and the washing machines work perfectly (our clothes were so dirty after the Gibb River Road).
The highlight of our stay was the friendly and amazing staff ! Thank you to Bryan for his kindness and for helping us to fix our awnings 🤩🙏
A lovely park, very quiet and clean. We had a chalet "cabin" which was very comfortable, spacious and well appointed.
Great park and amenities

Van site was clean and well serviced. Ground staff were extremely friendly and helpful. Was a great location out of town, close to Gantheaume pt to view sunsets over water. Handy to all services that might be needed for van servicing or spares.
Nice park clean toilets and showers. Very nice staff
Nicely park located south of the main township. Great service from the staff at reception.
Fabulous well kept caravan park. All things seem to work!
Very cramped caravan park. Packed in like sardines.

Definitely not worth the money! The showers and toilets are absolutely disgusting and haven't been cleaned in months! The pool looks nice but it's also filthy. there is a sewage/grey water problem, the ground behind my van was completely slushy and stunk. My dog drank water or something and vomited. This needs to be reported to the health authorities!

Definitely not worth the money! The showers and toilets are absolutely disgusting and haven’t been cleaned in months! The pool looks nice but it’s also filthy. there is a sewage/grey water problem, the ground behind my van was completely slushy and stunk. My dog drank water or something and vomited. This needs to be reported to the health authorities! And some of the staff shouldn’t work with kids or animals, they have no idea and are just rude.

Biggest load of lies ever in your response below….I paid a dog sitter who didn’t do what I expected of her, also I was never abusive or rude to you!! EVER!! In fact I only spoke briefly to you on the phone once, you told me to come get my dog, I said I was on my way and then you hung up on me. My dog was never in distress and absolutely did so have a bucket of water as was observed by my fellow campers behind and beside me. More lies that you tell… and how would you know you never left your office!!
No need to black list me as I would never want to come to your filthy park ever again!!! You’re attitude and the park are disgusting.

And how’s the filthiness of your amenities anything to do with my dog!!!

The staff at this caravan park were absolutely incredible and super helpful! 🤩|We stocked up on supplies in nearby Chinatown, just a 7-minute drive away. While there's not much else around, the stunning sunset views more than make up for it ⭐️|The park itself was|very clean, with excellent amenities and a fantastic swimming pool !|One thing to note for pet owners: there's limited space for furry friends to stretch their legs, so it's not the most pet-friendly spot

Little out of town which we liked.
Staff are friendly and helpful. Pool is amazing and the lap pool is a bonus!
Enjoyed our stay!

Safe distance from town.
Good facilities. Pool.

The staff at this caravan park were absolutely incredible and super helpful! 🤩
We stocked up on supplies in nearby Chinatown, just a 7-minute drive away. While there's not much else around, the stunning sunset views more than make up for it ⭐️
The park itself was
very clean, with excellent amenities and a fantastic swimming pool !
One thing to note for pet owners: there's limited space for furry friends to stretch their legs, so it's not the most pet-friendly spot
Beautiful caravan park great friendly staff and a very relaxing atmosphere

Great place to stay, with resort type pool and large sites. We have a grassed site which is well maintained. The amenities are clean but need some upgrades.
The park has entertainment and food vans, but noticed a drop off in the food vans?
The park is well managed, with Wendy and Darren having excellent communication skills.
One suggestion would be having toilets accessible in the pool area.

Great pool & food trucks. Large sites.
Very busy
Great park super clean !
Powered site for ten days, great amenities and pressure in showers.
Staff very helpful. Large sites, clean amenities, fabulous pool.

Staff were amazing, we camped for 5 nights here and was good a bit dusty but most parks we have found are like that. Camp kitchen was so far down the back of the park you needed to pack a lunch to get there. Amenities were fair (they were clean) I just feel for the price that caravan parks are charging they should be updating their amenities. Pool was absolutely amazing. Would stay again.
Schöner Platz mit zweckmäßigen Stellplätzen, gute sanitäre Anlagen, abends Musik

Great caravan park, very tidy and clean. Staff were friendly and very helpful. A lovely pool to swim in and lots of shade from the beautiful mature trees in the park. Another bonus… only 3km from Gantheaume Point, an amazing beach you can drive onto. Great for a picnic lunch, walk, swim and ‘boat watch’.

I have stayed here previously and found my accommodation exceptional ! Everything is so clean, well organized and very comfortable, as a Single Lafy, I felt very safe, secure and comfortable, the Reception and general staff are obliging, courteous and happy to have a chat and make sure your stay is as I have said - highly recommend this stay - you will need transport as it is not close to town and not far from Cable Beach and amenities although your own transport to move about - I will definitely come back as very clean and lovely - thank you
Caravan sites are extreemly small showers are extreemly shit no water but there hot will never come back

We just finished up a 7 night stay in a 2 bedroom chalet - brilliant location, close to everywhere but secluded and tranquil within the grounds. Clean rooms, bedding and bathrooms. Lovely staff and great pool area! Thanks for our wonderful stay, we felt safe and at home at Broome Vacation Village!

The people of this park are wonderful. Jude in Admin and the other staff of the park were always pleasant, helpful and efficient.
The cabin we occupied for 17 nights was neat, clean and provided all we needed.
If Broome Bus Co provided a service the location would have been great. It was quiet most nights and only other inconsiderate occupants played very loud music at times. These were dealt with well by caravan park manager.
We have booked to stay again on our return trip.
Staff made every effort on short notice to find a suitable site for us for our 2 day Broome stop over.
Stayed here on caravan site 30 great location to all amenities.  Service and cleanliness great and wonderful pool.

This is the second time in eleven months we have been here. Such friendly responsive staff, clean amenities and good size sites. Cannot fault it. Thanks to the Mangers for our chat while you were walking around, you are legends!
The people running this vacation village are excellent at customer service and the location is peaceful and accommodation all you need. Too far from town to walk but with a car it's wonderful.

If you're on an unpowered site it will be tucked in the corner next to the main road, so get ready to fall asleep to the noise of road trains. The camp kitchen is in the middle of the bathrooms so it stinks.
When you arrive you're handed an A4 page of rules if you walk in, and I think the owners must have shares in a signage company because I've never seen so many aggressive rules and directives in a park. Would not stay again.

A fantastic caravan park  . The mangment & staff are so friendly ,they take pride in in their park , amenities & laundry are very clean & maintained. A lovely big swimming pool to cool off in .
They even making sure we could fit our bus & car trailer in. Thankyou for a great experience in Broome:)

Lovely little spot, we were up the wider end of the park with very little road noise. The long term residents were friendly and looking out for us in the unseasonable heavy downpours.
Clean amenities, great camp kitchen. We appreciated the site’s sand mat to keep our setup as free as possible from red dirt and white sand.
My suggestion to all parks would be to have a unisex family room for both parents to bathe kids.
Nice caravan park.

Yeah it is very small which is good but the signage is confusing if your not from around the area. It says only Broome International when it's on maps as Domestic also. The only pick up parking in a kiss and go scenario is at the Departures so I am stressing over if it is the right spot... There is no other area to stop so fingers crossed.
Very clean and tidy rooms, self cerficant and quiet place.
Excellent washing machines! Nice unpowered section with both sun and shade.

Nice people but no eftpos (that's why only 3 stars). My cabin was adequate but very old and tired.
If you don't have your own vehicle you will be up for a lot of taxi fares as the Caravan Park is 4km out of town.

Stayed on a powered site for 5 nights late July 2025, upon arrival all we could smell was a septic stench through our area.
I didn’t worry too much at the start as there was works within the area within the park so I thought someone may have stirred something up prior to our arrival.

By the next morning, there was water running up, out of the drain that they “sealed” with a pot plant…🤬 running under our van, which had also ran along our power, water and drainage hoses.

We raised this with reception to be addressed as we left for our tour that morning, and advised them we would be back at 1pm.

We returned around 12:45, went to our site and  no one came to see us at 1pm, thinking it must be sorted.
Around 1:45, water was once again coming out of the drain, flooding our site.

Raised it again with reception around 2-2:30pm on our way out again, who reported it to maintenance.

We got a call asking where we were, and I stated to them we were out, and we were told there’s nothing we could do.

They had no space for us on another site as they had booked out the emergency sites.
They informed us that there system is overwhelmed and cannot keep up with the demand.

I informed staff I’ll look for a new site at other parks and will be chasing a refund on our remaining nights, and they told me to take that up with management, so I told them to pass my number on.

I was also told by staff that “management” said there’s nothing they can do to fix this.

I tried telling the staff member it just needs a cap on it, but they became rude and blunt and wouldn’t actually listen, I also mentioned the cap when we first reported this…

We never got a call from management,
I ended up going to the local supply store and buying a cap and capping the pipe myself that fixed the issue about 90%, with the odd faint smell on occasion still coming through our site.

When we arrived back at our site to cap the pipe, one of the maintenance staff members rocked up with a manager, and said I wish I thought of that..(capping the pipe)
That individual staff member is quite arrogant and a camper within our area also mentioned they have had issues with him.

The manager did apologise for the inconvenience and thanked me for fixing there issue, but also raised its an ongoing problem with old drainage.

If it’s such a problem why are you booking every site?

They clearly don’t care about the customers actual experience.

Only reason I fixed this as we couldn’t get another site at another park at this busy time.

I can personally recommend the RAC park, stayed there in 2021, was a great experience.

A hidden gem. On the outskirts of Broome, on a dusty highway, but pass through the drive in and you're into an oasis. Lots of clean amenities and there was the added bonus of a speedway event on down the road. Some local motorsport I thought, but it was a state championship. Great stay

Excellent clean well looked after going there again.  Pool was great and entertainment was at a level that was enjoyable if you liked it or if it wasn't for you it didn't dominate the whole place.
Being 5 minutes from the centre of Broome security is not an issue.
Great park well worth staying here

The park is well run still updating septic unfortunately some smells... nice place...  no issues leaving your gear around ... loved the speedway night,  if you can and it's on walk down, worth a look, they will give you a discount if you tell them that you are from the  caravan park.

Fantastic caravan park, got us in during peak periods, and we're very grateful for that!

We were in the unpowered sites, and the sites were grassy and had plenty of room to fit the van and car side by side comfortably.

Amenities were all in top order and clean, laundry had all the usual suspects and "tap and go" options for the machines.

The park had food trucks and live music in the afternoons on certain days.

The pool area was fantastic! Huge pool and adjoining lap pool if your looking to do some laps!

Plenty of area poolside to hang out and heaps of sun lounges.

Staff were fantastic and very accommodating

The park is perfectly situated just out of town to avoid the crowds of people, 5 mins to China town and shops, 10 mins to cable beach

Definitely recommend staying here!
Park generally good but for walking or riding into town  ie 5klm is a nightmare.... you walk along busy highway for 2.3klm then there is a path very dangerous

On the edge of Broome beautiful swimming pool
Amenities well maintained and clean. Friendly helpful staff...
Thanks guys...

Pool and sites are great with plenty of shade. Excellent location not far from town. Food van was there one night which was awesome. But the reason for not giving 5 stars I didn't think the cleanliness of the bathrooms was up to scratch, especially compared to other WA parks we had stayed at recently.
Very good carvan park nice swimming pool an only 5km from Broome
Great caravan park Good amenities and nice pool
Great spot big sites close to town reasonably priced non powered sites.very busy

Friendly reception, large caravan sites, beautiful pool. Easy driving distance to town and beaches. While this sounds ideal, the only downside is the sewerage smell in the toilets. It came and went in the ladies, but the men’s was really bad. Not sure if it’s the bore water that causes the smell but it really calls for a strong chlorine wash down.
All round good park on the older side but pool is modern and well used just stayed 2 nights No problems close enough to town and cable beach.
It's always a good stay here friendly staff fantastic pool one of the best pools in a  caravan park close to town with out being in town

The water pressure is so poor that we need to put our pump on and use water in our tanks.  Was told it was due to too many guests using water.  Even after morning vacate very little difference.||If you are looking at using internet (we use Telstra) then 1 to 2 bars is the best you will get.  Constant buffering of football and tv.||Dusty when wind is about. Doesn’t have to be a strong wind.||Good shady trees.||Concrete pads are 2-3” above the ground so reversing on to them needs to be done carefully.||We have a large site which is good.
Friendly caring service staff

Un peu déçue, nous choisissons un camping pour nous permettre d’avoir plus de confort que dans notre petit van, la cuisine n’a pas de plaque de cuisson, complètement ouverte, aucun moyen d’être à l’abri du vent, juste 2 tables.
La wifi ne fonctionne pas même si nous attendons la nuit lorsque plus personne n’est censé être connecté …
Sinon les emplacements étaient corrects, les sanitaires étaient propres. Assez cher pour pas grand chose, la sensation de payer pour la piscine.

Great caravan park, excellent amenities, lovely big pool, with plenty of banana lounges and chairs to cool down.
We love a caravan park a little out of the hustle and bustle, this park is that, giving you the time to chill, unwind and explore all areas of Broome in a hop step and a jump.
Would not hesitate to recommend to others.
Was OK...amenities could do with a revamp

It doesn’t require a copy of ID when I checked in. I found that was a bit different with my past experience.
The kitchen is pretty old facility so as the bathroom and showers.
It has a weird smell around the park everyday after sunset.
The location is around 6 minutes drive from spinifex brewery.
All the other caravan parks were booked out, so I thought would give here a shot.
But probably won’t be back here again.
$65 per night is the most expensive caravan park I've seen in the entire country! And it was just a standard caravan park. No views, not even located in town
Good park, large sites, dusty
We couldn't book all booked out so must be good so not sure about anything except customer service which was exceptional. The staff tried to help find accommodation elsewhere for us.
The staff were very friendly and helpful.  Once the maintenance work currently being undertaken is completed on some amenity buildings, they will be great.
Not happy

We travelled to Broome recently and made selected a cabin at Broome Vacation Village. We were on the outskirts of Broome town, yet central to everywhere.

The village was secure and rooms well appointed. 5 of us slept comfortably and the Aircon worked a treat.

During the hot day we swam in the pool - the Broome seabreeze was just the shot when we exited the pool.

Did I say we were close to everything? The township was 5 minutes up the road, cable beach was 5 min up the road and the shops - you guessed it, 5 min up the road.

If you are visiting Broome and thinking of an alternative option 5 minutes from everything - give Broome Vacation Village a look.

Happy travels
This place has it all great staff top location and superb amenities (pool toilets and showers all spotless) great camp kitchen that is kept immaculate definitely value for money
Schöne saubere Lodges. Achtung, vom Vacation Village gibt es keine Öffis. In die Stadt geht es nur zu Fuß (45 min) oder mit E-Roller.
Advertises Wifi as part of the Park Facilities however it is inconsistent, slow, and was essentially unusable during our stay. Very disappointing
Nice place for staying at. Facilities are very clean and well maintained. Many noise from the road beside and not very shady sites. Anyway I would comeback
Great place to park up, nice staff, pool and close to town. We enjoyed our stay, it was very safe regardless of the negative comments we’d received. We’d certainly come back.

The only place we could book 4 months out, powered caravan site very small dirt base and park on the road, ammenities ok but why do we still have key codes on them, ridiculous, biggest issue and why I recommend you stay well clear is the traffic noise on Port Rd totally unacceptable impossible to get a good night’s rest.

I spent eight nights here.
After a short trip I wanted to go back to this park so I called the afterhours number but they told me it was full so I decided to have a quick look to see if that was really true. 5 or 6 places were still available. It's very disappointing that I was turned away just because the man on the phone didn't feel like doing anything really sad the ladies at reception were actually friendly
I will certainly not come back again absolute cheek!!!

Very small dirt sites. Very dusty with wind swirling red dirt around. Cars going past you kick even more up. Laundry extremely disappointing. |Toilet block OK, old but cleaned. Water was hot. Cannot recommend. |North side acceptable, could recommend.  Won’t be back tho.

Definitely the loudest caravan park I've ever stayed in.  Facilities are good.  However the road noise never stops!  Lots of semi trailers blazing past in what feels like a 24 hour a day assault on your ears.  If you value a sleep in or are a light sleeper this is NOT THE PLACE FOR YOU.
Great spot, good facilities and fenced off, but driveway a bit tight. Highly recommend

I will NOT RECOMMEND this caravan park. This is the WORST caravan park I ever been in Australia. Most of the camp are litterally 3m from the road. It was so NOISY that we couldn’t sleep all the night. We pay 60$ !!! for an unpowered DUSTY, DIRTY campground.

REALLY BAD EXPERIENCE at this caravan park.
All sites are between two roads, road trains and cars all night. Impossible to have a good sleep unfortunately.
I ask for a cancellation and a refund after the first night which wasn’t possible.

The space to park is pretty small, very dusty and without shade.
Amenities need a good clean as well.

I would recommend to look for other options in Broome before booking here.
Broome vacation village caravan park is is far from a relaxing place to enjoy broome.

Spent 2 nights in this park. We were in the South camp, very dusty. Toilets clean, grounds maintained. BBQ's need maintenance, we helped an elderly couple light the BBQ with our lighter as the park one didn't work. Showers need a gooseneck so the water runs down not out over everything. Staff  friendly.

We've stayed here 4 times on an ensuite site and it's always great.
The amenities are very clean.

Of course everywhere in Broome is expensive, that’s a given. Putting that aside, this caravan park is not bad at all. What we liked: mature trees all over the place, beautiful pool area, excellent camp kitchen with free gas BBQs, helpful staff with a can-do attitude.
What we would love to see improved: the sites are a very mixed bag. You may get a beautiful grassy site with your own palm trees, or if you’re booking at shorter notice, you may get a tiny dusty site cheek by jowl with another caravan. Some of the sites in the South campground are extremely tight to manoeuvre in/out of, and give you just enough space to open your awning before you touch the next van.
Another thing that would make this site better is to heat the pool. In dry season not many people seem to use it because it’s so cold. Refreshing on a super hot day but only until your lips go blue 15 minutes later.
Adding more washing machines to the south campsite would be good because there were people queuing their bags of laundry up from 7am to use them.  And finally it would be good to have a little extra lighting for the picnic bench eating/BBQ area in the South campground. Once the sun sets you can’t really see what you’re cooking and I had to use my phone light to check whether the food was done. All in all a great campsite and with the extra security measures at the gate we felt very safe.
We enjoyed this park.  Big sites,  relaxed atmosphere, and a little out of town so felt safe.
Large park great pool area. Amenities are clean but dated. Not much of a camp kitchen very small. Where we were very close to neighbours. Safe area to stay not very far from town.
Friendly staff, huge sites and a fantastic pool, close to everything

Nice friendly clean safe place.
Not far from shops and attractions but far enough from Broome town.
We have been here before and other caravan park and we will come again.

I had a bad experience because I forgot only one day to label my food bag in the fridge because I work a lot and didn’t have time to write it and it was on Thursday (the day they remove non labelled bags from the fridge). So when I came back from work, I discovered that my food bags with 100$ food inside wasn’t here so they just throw it away.
Big waste of money for me and big waste of FOOD !!
You should create a little area in the corner of the kitchen where you put non labeled bags or just create an advertising sticker ! And if one day after having put it, bag is still not labelled , then you can throw away.
It’s sad because it did upset me even if the camping is very nice so ..

We were very disappointed with the professionalism of the reception team. We had booked an unpowered site and received confirmation by email. However, when we arrived, we were told there were no unpowered sites left — something that was never mentioned beforehand.

Without being made aware of the change, I ended up paying the remaining balance, only to realize later that we had been charged for a powered site, which is nearly double the price of what we originally booked.

This was clearly a mistake from the reservation team — mistakes can happen — but what’s unacceptable is the complete lack of transparency, no goodwill gesture, and no refund offered. The manager showed no kindness or willingness to make things right. Very disappointing experience.

Great location, safe place. Clean ablutions and plenty of them. Nice big sites for van, pool looked great but didn’t get the chance to use it. Ran out of time. Staff are very friendly and helpful. Our second time staying there, will definitely stay again.
Friendly staff,helpful
Great customer service. From booking to arriving. Rooms are clean and tidy
Erica at reception was very helpful!Michael and the other grounds mem do an excellent job!Overall a lovely place to stay again!Accept for the cats eyes/bin dies everywhere

Camping vraiment super même un peu avant la saison sèche, quasi personne et une piscine super pour se rafraîchir, les emplacements sont pas trop collés aux autres et les douches sont biens
On peut même voir des wallyby au fond

Helaas de slechtste (en duurste) nacht in Australië tot nu toe. Kakkerlakken bij de kampeerplaats, verouderd sanitair, vlakbij de snelweg naar Broome die je de hele nacht hoort en blaffende honden de hele nacht door van bewoners aan de overkant.
Voor twee nachten geboekt en betaald maar na eerste nacht al vertrokken. Jammer van het geld, we kregen geen refund, maar beter voor de nachtrust.
Great park, pool and lovely staff would definitely recommend if you are after a safe site away from town

Continues to be a quiet park supported by excellent staff.

Unfortunately the grassed sites were generally unavailable due to maintenance in preparation for the Broome busy season.

Mosquitoes and midges were a problem during our stay in early May although we understood this was a Broome wide problem this year (2025)
Good place to stay. Staff friendly but showers need attending to
Great place , clean amenities,  good sites and a huge pool for swimming
Just arrived staff were very helpful site good. So far so good

We don’t do caravan parks and this is a perfect example of why, caravans parked on top of each other, lots of people all packed in.  It’s fine if you need to stay (we had no choice) but otherwise explore Australia countryside and save yourself a lot (was over $80 a night and charged per person instead of per van!)

The only thing great about this caravan park was the pool.  Caravans are crammed in like sardines. Car couldnt be parked completely off the road.  Was told if car doesnt fit, it needs to be parked in the visitors car park. Had to clean washing machine before I could use it. Half the toilets and showers were blocked off.  Booked for 2 nights originally, wanted to stay another 2 and was charged an extra $3.50 per night.  Had to stay another night and was again charged an extra $4.50 for that night. The reason we were told was it is peak season.  Will definately not be recommended to anyone I know. How can you cross two seasons in 3 days?

Got a chalet for our honeymoon.
Staff were very friendly and informative.
Rooms are nice and clean. Would definitely come back

Room was very spacious, comfortable and clean. However, the bathroom was very small and restrictive! The hand basin is so tiny, you cannot wash your face without getting water all over the floor! Also, having 2 separate taps for hot and cold water is very dated and inconvenient! I can't understand how just about the whole cabin has been renovated, but the bathroom basin is still something from the dark ages!|Booking.com information said there was an oven in the cabin, but there wasn't. Disappointing!!|The worst thing of all was the location! Having had our car break down and having to be without a car for 7 days was a nightmare!! There is no public transport at this end of Broome, even though there's a bus stop out the front.......apparently buses don't stop here anymore! Catching a taxi was so expensive ($28 for a 6 min drive) that we were forced to stay at the caravan park for 3 days which was very frustrating!! The location was also too far away to be within walking distance from anything! I did walk to the Port one day, but that was exhausting, especially in the heat!
Over priced and offers very little

Excellent caravan park
Clean and tidy
Great site
Shady
Amenities clean and updated
Recommend highly

We are staying in our beautiful caravan at this marvellous caravan park. The facilities are brilliant, camp kitchen is a ripper and the pool is coolish and very wet. Don't stay in site 17 because we would like it vacant for the next time we come this way.

As secure as camping on the side of the road.  No care given. No refunds.
I will never go there again .

We paid for a whole week, the last day we decided to extend one more night but the offices were closed and we intended to report it in the morning the next day (something I have done several times in other caravan park). We were woken up by a man at 2am saying WE WERE STEALING THAT IT WAS ILLEGAL. At no time did we intend to do anything illegal or let alone leave without paying (which they accused us of). They made us feel very embarrassed, they took the key of the campsite in a bad way and of course we couldn't sleep the rest of the night... I don't know if it is a racist act because we are latin people or what they thought we were but I don't plan to come back to this caravan park ever in my life
THE place to be!!! It's perfectly perfect!!

Advertised as NO PETS, and that’s ok, but an Assistance Dog IS NOT A PET!|How in this day and age can a business not understand this?|I insisted they take the booking and it’s like they we’re waiting for me to arrive so they could make a big fuss and belittle me.|I dared to say how embarrassing it was to be refused a booking and then all hell broke loose with Ginger who even called out the Manager Brad so he could show off his bully boy style.|Because apparently mentioning the embarrassment was me being extremely rude.|I wouldn’t recommend anyone go here, especially if you have an AD

Amazing caravan park! All the staff are incredibly friendly and caring. A special shout-out to Rebecca—she was so kind and went out of her way to print some documents for me. The park has a beautiful pool that's perfect for relaxing, and the site spots are spacious with your own water tap. I really enjoyed my stay here and would highly recommend it to anyone!

Amazing place and service!
Thank you Jenny!
Great spot with great deals in the wet season
Staffs are nice. Room is tidy and clean with good price.

Great caravan park, |we got a shady site close to the shower block |lovely staff  |Wasn’t to many people |at this time of year as it is very hot|Would recommend this place if anyone who is in Broome.|(Down side ) was a bit out of town but taxi service is ok
The family room was absolutely amazing. They provide everything you need. We will definitely come back love the whole set up and the nighttime you can see many of Wallabies. How cool is that.😊😊😊
Lovely Caravan park,the only negative for me is the pool closes at 5-30,and when it's still around 37 degrees I think it's to early. My opinion only.
Fabulous caravan park with great off peak deals. Large, shady sites are available, amenities are good and the staff really helpful. Bonus is that there is lots of wildlife in the park.
Nice caravan park and good value for money at only $32 per night. Pool was probably the best pool we have seen so far travelling three months
Great park, lots of shady sites and a beautiful pool
Stayed at a power+water site, great off season discount, pool and facilities  are clean and conveniently positioned
Nice ark with great amenities and good price if you visit in non peak times
Ohh lovely nice and clean

A great park just as you head into town. Easy access to get to all the other attractions outside of Broome. The park is well maintained with nice big sites and a beautiful pool. The staff are friendly and helpful. Will definitely be back.

It's a little out of town, but nice and quiet with no issues.
Ladies at the front counter were nice, and the grounds men also.
Lots of wildlife around.
Great pool.

We recently spent 8 nights here and found everything to be well run, clean and spacious.

We had advised of the size of our setup prior to arriving and as a result we had a fabulous site with plenty of space. And it was easy to get into - always a plus.

The ONLY thing I’d like to see is a shuttle bus into town for those of us who would like more than 1 drink.

Staying at Broome Vacation Village Caravan Park was an absolute delight! The park is clean, well-maintained, and offers an array of amenities that cater to both families and solo travelers. Its close proximity to local attractions makes it a convenient base for exploring the wonders of Broome.

The staff go above and beyond to ensure a pleasant experience; they are both friendly and knowledgeable about the area. With spacious sites, a tranquil atmosphere, and superb facilities, this park offers a top-notch caravanning experience.

Highly recommend!

Well maintained and safe environment with great communal facilities, such as the pool. |Flexible and variable accomodation options. |All of Broome’s top features are only within minutes of the caravans park location. |

Never take an overflow site here. They charge you the same price for some super small site next to the entrance. There is street noise an people are coming or leaving all night long. Some of them are honking as well 🤷🏼‍♂️ power and water are miles away. They turned on the sprinklers one night so our whole site including us got wet 🤦🏼‍♂️ to sum up, you won’t sleep, you can’t sit outside and that’s gonna cost you $65 per day
Booked for one week stayed for three
Would recommend Broome Vacation Village fantastic services from staff and the amenities are maintained to the highest standards
Half way 5 kms between Cable Beach and Broome  clean and tidy, shaded sites.

Was quoted $62/night - charged $66/night.|DOES NOT PROVIDE UNPOWERED SITES YET ADVERTISES IT DOES! As a solo travelling female I like to plan ahead - no choice as busy season.|Saw people coming in unpowered while I was there.|Very noisy, on Port Rd & sites small/cramped.
Very clean amenities & friendly service.  Just too many people in Broome LOL!

We stay at this park every year for 3 months and found everything is nice and clean, the pool is large and gardens beautifully maintained . The ensuite sites are great . Bookings are essential as it is popular . Recommended
Due to flooding was unable to get to the park yet got charged for the 5 days we weren't there with no refund!!
Noisy and cramped
Camp site was next to main road, noisy! Small sites, Neighbour had some kind of water heater, generator running every 15mins all night! Uncomfortable.

Management is horrible.|Gardeners are nosey.|I highly recommend to not book in at Vacation village Broome as they will enter property you are renting without consent.|Managers are nice at the beginning but become nasty at the end of the lease no matter how early your rent is paid, how tidy and clean you keep the property , follow all rules JO the manager to be exact will always have nasty words for you.Never have an adult conversation and keep calm, always gets heated and wants to be the only one heard.|Vacation village managers Brad and Jo are highly racist, as I have spoken to neighbours of another skin colour and they said they did not have to pay as much bond as I did (Bond I did not get back at all , even paid for a exit clean). Even after the exit clean Jo said I left the place disgusting.Electricity bills are rigged.||

Great park. Good pool, nice modern clean amenities, good sites with concrete slabs. We ended up stuck here as our car broke down but the managers were fantastic and helped move us to the overflow area even though they were fully booked! Lovely people and we would definitely stay here again.

Broome est une ville de passage d'environ 15 milles habitants. Ce n'est pas une capitale. Il n'y a aucun centre d'intérêt donc il est réellement inconcevable d'obliger les clients de ce camping à payer deux nuits. De plus comme quelques camping, le bureau ferme à 04h de l'après-midi.  Ce qui est complètement incroyable pour des lieux sensé rendre service au touriste.
Excellent overall I love it
Great caravan park, lovely staff and a great pool!
Out of town but has a huge pool, great staff and we'll maintained gardens.  Large sites, very safe and much cheaper than in town. Highly recommend.
Great park just outside of Broome. Amenities are dated but clean. Pool is beautiful.  Receptionist's are fantastic willing to help wherever possible.
Very good caravan park with large bay spaces for larger vans.
The best pool we have been too in a CP. Washing machines loads are very small and not enough for the size of the park though. Friendly staff. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

The sites were very roomy and shaded. Facilities were clean and pool was excellent. Staff were very friendly. Nothing was a problem for the park operators to change sites and help with what to look at around the area and were very helpful in helping booking tours etc

Nice caravan park just out of Broome.
Friendly staff & fantastic pool.
Downside. Pool closes at 5.30pm when people want to be cooling down for the night.
Camp kitchen is a huge let down.
With the money they take in every season you would think they could make a better effort & have a couple of decent camp kitchens.

A little walk to beach … great customer service!! Really helpful….it was a packed house for events however they worked really hard to find us a powered site …. Wonderful sunset… coffee and restaurant onsite
Was a great place to stay. Would have stayed longer if I organised things a bit better.
Nice place with lots of vans coming and going. Reasonable facilities.

Great sites
Amazing swimming pool
Lovely park. Friendly staff. Amenities clean. Busy, need yo book ahead.
Great service quiet spot brilliant amenities
Good amenities friendly staff and a pool.

We had a site with power and water. Were able to put our drain down the waste pipe of a cabin behind us.
The laundry facilities were well patronized with a queue by 9 am. Washing machines were also running as late as 10 pm.
The sewage smell was also quite strong around the dump point.
The swimming pool was pristine. There must be a good reason why the pool times are limited to 8.30am-5.30pm.
The location suited us, just a little north of town. Relaxing surroundings and sounds of Birdlife.
Large sites was a bonus. Clean amenities, well maintained grounds great pool. Lovely staff and we were told by text if something was happening.

The staff were terrific.  We were booked in for two days, then a gap and then two more days.  But first day of the gap we broke down, and were towed back to Broome.  The staff found us a powered site, we arrived at 9.45pm and it was a site that they had picked so the tow truck could back us into, so no problem, and they were fine for us to fix it up later.  The pool was also good to cool off in.
Spacious sites

We spent 6 nights here, the reception staff are lovely, very kind and accomodating, the garden/maintenance staff were grumpy and at times a little short and rude…. The bays are nice and big and they don’t shove everyone ontop of each other, that’s was good! The park isn’t secure very open and no fences, anyone could walk in at any time of day and night. The pool area is beautiful and nice and big to accomodate for everyone. Location isn’t the greatest your right across from Broome road that’s 110 and to far to walk anywhere. Showers and toilets weren’t the cleanest and some of the time the hot water didn’t work. One thing that was disappointing is they had people doing the septic tanks while the park was fairly full. The smell was putrid, at times I had to hold my breath, didn’t help that is was right next to the bathrooms and the clothes line, we could also smell this at the camping spot we had….  Overall I’ve given 3 stars. We still enjoyed our time in Broome and are thankful for our stay.
Lovely park . Just far enough out of town to have no problems. Quiet  & safe.

The pool is the best.  Having a lap pool and a beautiful lagoon pool was so nice.  The pool never seemed crowed. Very clean.   We were placed in the overflow section of the park which we had grass, water, power but had to collect our Gray water, which you emptied into large plastic containers scattered close by and throughout the area.  Overflow area sites are also used to use their own toilet and showers.  We had two nights and then moved onto another site, which I booked the 2nd day. We were there.  The funny thing is first 2 nights got a price as very last minute, and the 3rd night got last minute, so the 3rd night was more than the first two nights.  Absolutely crazy system.  3rd night site was 130, and this time, we were allowed to use the shower and toilet.  Showers were OK.  Red dirt gets into the grouting and tiles, and even after a mop, it still looks dirty.  Water pressure could be improved, but at least it was hot.  Washing machines were at a good price of$4.00 using coin but$5.00 when using a card.  You can catch tours from the main gate.  We stayed here a couple of years ago and would stay again.

Just 3k’s out of town
Good amenities and well maintained
Very enjoyable stay in a good location with clean well maintained facilities. Great pool  and shady site. Entertainment and food can a bonus
Absolutely wonderful staff great service very knowledgeable about the area. Thanks for all the information Jenny !
Tidy park with clean amenities. Nice swimming pool.
Great stay at Broome caravan park. Wonderful staff.

Pool is beautiful, as you drive in its all lovely and green, then it disappears to dust.
Our site was in the middle of lots of backpackers, they were no problem but missed chatting to the caravaners.
Fantastic pool

We had a 4 night stay here , staff very friendly, pool the best I have seen ,sites great ,amenities,dirty they need a good scrub , floor and wall tiles laundry great ,price $4 per load the park needs a camp kitchen, otherwise definitely recommend
Great spot for big rigs but need to chat with them first, close to town

Very friendly staff, loads of big shady trees and a truly fabulous pool. The location is good but a bit on the noisy side due to it being on the main access road to Broome. If your stay happens to coincide with the speedway circuit next door it is horribly noisy. The camp kitchen is adequate but is located at the back end of the park and with its low corrugated iron roof, is very hot during the day and therefore an unpleasant place to sit or prepare food. Amenities are satisfactory and clean if not a little tired. Overall though it is a good park and we enjoyed our stay.
This was a lovely place to stay while visiting Broome. Had a beautiful pool to cool off in on those hot days.
Amazing pool! Jenny in the front office is lovely and very helpful

Vey nice caravan park, wonderful swimming pool, and very nice workers, a big big thanks to Pep, he just let us feel like at home!!!
Thank you Pep!
Toilets and shower cubicles and kitchen area could be better bringing them up to a modern standard But it’s a nice place, and it’s pretty cheap

It's a very nice and peaceful place for caravan,  tent. You can see some bird life and frill neck lizards. The kitchen is perfect for cooking and has a nice sit out place. I loved it. The front office staff were very friendly, helpful and kind. I met some lovely people there. I really enjoyed the stay. Thanks.

The caravan park has a special price on their web site, so before booking through a browser make sure to check it. It doesn’t have a gate or keyboard, everyone can come in but we didn’t have any problem during our staying. It is 10-20 mins away from the center of Broome and all the essentials. We couldn’t swim at the ocean because was the period of presence of poison jellyfish, crocodiles and sharks. For this reason, we really enjoyed the beautiful swimming pool. A bit old facilities but always clean. Not many mosquitos during the day, but some lizards and frogs in the showers later on the day.
The caravan park is well maintenance and the staff is friendly. The park is dog friendly!

Had a brilliant 4 day stay here with my little dog, have to keep pets on lead due to past incidents of not so nice dogs behaving badly......such is life huh. The pool & atmosphere is awesome, all the staff were friendly and welcoming. Would recommend this park to everyone.
Stayed 2 weeks in 1 bedroom Chalet. Great rooms and well priced. All staff extremely friendly and helpful
Wonderful caravan park for a short or long stay,  managers are very friendly and helpful.  Best pool in a park by far .
Alles toll hier. Sensationeller Pool.
Nice and lovely staff. Pool is great with a long track to really swim your best. Sites are nice and we were advice carefully for our rooftop tent. Yes, leaves everywhere, but who cares?
Amazing pool, relatively big sites. It's let down by its location (can't compete with cable beach parks), but it's also much cheaper
Amazing swimming pool, nice people

Stayed for 3 night and it was perfect....old but nice and clean amenities the place was well kept..nice sites...loved the pool and the staff was friendly and made u feel welcome..would highly recommend this place to anyone visiting broome

As a group we stayed on 2 powered sites and in one cabin. We didn't use the amenities much but they were clean and tidy. Laundry was also good with washer and dryer, $4 each and some machine took card. The swimming pool was by far our favourite part about this park. The pool is only open between 8.30 and 5.30 which was annoying some days when we were up early or out later and just wanted to cool off. There was a magpie nest near our sites (sites 4 & 5) it took a dislike to 3 of the kids and made each of their heads bleed  when it swooped. Most of the kids wore bike helmets when they left the caravan to avoid getting hurt again. Suggested to staff that they should put a sign up to warn people. Park is a little ways out of town but the cost difference makes it worth while.
Regarding cabins, they are old and need updating but they are clean and comfortable.
Great pool and plenty of sites. cabin needed a bit of fixing up but every thing else was great.

What an awesome park to stop at. Just a couple of km's out of town with lovely flat sites with a choice of grassed sites where you need to be able to collect your own grey water and no shady trees, double slab sites or just on the dirt with lovely shady trees. The park is also dog friendly.  The swimming pool is stunning and the grounds are very well looked after. The managers are very friendly and helpful. The amenities are old but clean. We felt very safe in this park. At only $25.00 per night for power and water on double slab site during off peak, you can't get better than that. Would highly recommend this park for your visit to Broome.
Great caravan park, nice shady sites and a great swimming pool. Rob and Jen are very friendly and helpful 🙂 Cable beach is a short drive from the park.
Clean and neat
Nice place. Good facilities

On advise from another traveler who spends 5 months a year here We thought we would give it a go, we booked our site way back in Nov 22 for Aug 23 on he’s advise & we stayed a month, can’t fault the place, they were the most organised park we came across coming up the coast re best times to check in & the fella out front doing traffic control at check in time.
we chose a site out the back, yes you had to cart your grey water 20 metres to a dump point but with grey water tanks it’s easy to manage, only gripe was not the parks fault but irresponsible dog owners who think it’s there right to set there dogs free down the back & annoy all other dog owners who obey the park rules, take your mutts to the beach like responsible owners do there’s a few nice beach’s around if you look🙄
A small improvement might be a dedicated pathway through the sites from down back to the toilets, got some grumpy looks walking carefully as you can through sites to get to the toot when park was busy.
Great, slightly out of town spot. Felt safe, and the staff were obliging and always above a beyond with their help.
500 sites very busy. We had large block no shade
Big sites. Excellent pool. Lots of shade. Staff friendly and helpful. Reasonable price.

Good park. Amenities clean. Staff helpful and friendly.
My only suggestion would be a small amenities block  down in the back section where the caravans are.

We booked a powered caravan site & stayed early August. BEWARE - We were not told when we booked that we were allocated a site that does not allow a sullage hose, they handed us a 10 ltr bucket & made us empty into a large container located up the road. Ridiculous to make paying guests cart 10 ltr water to a holding tank that has to be lifted above waist height ?? Seriously? Never heard of this in all our travels & thank goodness we only stayed 4 nights. Our location site (grass at back) were close & narrow. Amenities were kept clean. Pool was lovely. Good location not far from town. Tours picked up out front.
Excellent caravan park although out of town. The pool made up for it. Very popular place with plenty of site space
Fantastic place to stay.   loved every minute

Love this Park, We come every year.
The New Owners are continuing to improve everything for our pleasure.
The staff are great.
Suggestion, the Men's middle Ablutions, ie the wash Basins, Taps
And the Piss Trough should be the next upgrade.
Nice park, super friendly staff, good facilities. Pool is great. Coffee van near reception serves lovely jaffles/coffees.

This caravan park was recommended to us as the best one to stay at in Broome. Right from the start, the staff made everything easy from fitting us in last minute to our dates being mixed up, but they also were very helpful there. The spots were long and wide and shady.
The pool looked amazing, but sadly, I didn't get a chance to use it. I highly recommend this c.p to anyone coming to Broome. 5 stars from me.
We also got to do the overnight trip to the horizontal falls and they pick you up out the front of this caravan park. I recommend this trip too as it was an  amazing experience as well.

The team here are great.
The Summerstar parks all seem to offer good assistance.
When presented with numerous caravan park options in towns we pick the Summerstar one

Silly drive streets,overcrowded, sewerage type smells probably from the garden watering system, I hope it was,messy shower block, and Muppet driving too fast . Not the parks fault but hey, can you enforce your own speed limits.
Very enjoyable stay
Great park.
Beautiful place
Great spot a short drive from town. Feels safe..has good amenities and a great pool.

Only a couple of minutes out of town 👍.  Nice spacious powered sites👍. Plenty of shade👍, unfortunately cockatoos loved the tree above our van and made a real mess in the 10 days we stayed.
Ammenities do not reflect price point, in desperate need of a thorough clean (dirt, cobwebs, spiders, insects).  Not nearly enough washing machines for peak season occupancy
The saving grace of this place is the pool area.  Great spot to cool off,  clean, nice sun lounges and if you go at the right times almost kid free 👍
By far the worst caravan park I have ever stayed at for so many reasons.
What a brilliant place to stay! We extended as the service was incredible and the pool so good on a hot day! Great spot for a recovery stay after a long drive! Thank you so much!
Caravan park amenities are clean great pool
A fantastic caravan park with large, shady spots. Great amenities and extremely friendly staff. Would highly recommend this park!!

This is a good park. A little bit out of town but so quiet. The amenities are neat & clean and could do with an update but l'm sure the owners are looking into it. It is not Cable Beach but it is a lot cheaper. I would recommend it.
Great caravan park ... very friendly staff, fantastic grounds and well maintained. Love the pool.
Good place to stay not to far from city centre
I truly found this to make a wonderful stay in Broome.
Very nice park, good size lots, would have loved to have got a grassed lot, but apparently not available to short term campers.

Nice caravan park, friendly staff, pool was the highlight, toilet & shower block was clean but showing it’s age.
Being just outside of Broome it is close to the speedway, waste management facility and a cattle holding yard, we found the smell drifted on the wind and was quite unpleasant at times.
